reviews.review_description: Tis game is crazy. You can play online, with friends, and there are different maps and games for people. And it’s free. But you do have to pay for lots of things in the game like more plane and more map. My fav thing to do it build my own plane because it’s the best and funist thing to do in tis game. And you can give a copy of your plane to friends and random people you find in game. Anyways I had to pull the gem alarm on tis because is to fun. You can also play offline

reviews.review_title: It's the best RC game on this market.
reviews.review_description:
This is honestly one of the best indie games on the Meta Shop. Along with the fact it is free! The RC models are great. The BYO is astonishing, and I have been able to make all my current and planned RC Aircraft in this game.

The only thing that I have a problem with (like all good VR games) is the community. 98% of the people on here are kids, and while I find it great that we are reaching out to the younger generation of potential RC enthusiasts, it reaches a point. 

I know Davy (the solo Dev for this game) has tried to fix this problem with 18+ rooms, and its not his fault they dont work. 

Along with that, I feel that Davy is one of those devs who actually listen to the community and keep the game updated and "new."

Again, this game is great, and I would highly recommend it to anyone. I have put countless hours into it, and I will continue to do so.

I have been playing for a while and i hit a home run i made the biggest plane you can make due to areas  outside my house and because of reqierd power and part limit i have made the biggest plane i dont mean to brag. This game is also great and realistic for me owning real rc planes i would love for you to reach out and see if my plane is the biggest you can contact my meata acount using chat if u wanna see the plane thanks for your time truly 5 stars 6 if i could

I love this game it is so much fun to play with friends you can do challenges,competitions and more this game is unique from the rest because it is not like the others where you have to pay for the game but what is bugging me is that you have to pay for the planes even though it’s not a lot it still shouldn’t be paid,In my opinion only 2 of the planes should be paid including the fastest one in the game and the most aerodynamic and stunt one in addition to this I personally like how you can connect a controller to your virtual reality headset this provides more realism and a realistic and more fun game experience the multiplayer servers work fantastically 
This is the only game I could sit and play for hours due to the endless possibilities it provides great job
Developer I hope to see this game succeed in the future. Love this game many support from-xrzq

Ive been looking for a RealFlight replacement for a long long time, and this sim scratches the itch VERY well.  the physics feel accurate - stalls happen when they should, unlike other sims that make non-trainer airframes feel like trainers that never stall.  The gripes I have are minor (namely, more customizability in aircraft setup, FPV camera view, gyro tuning), but I understand if this was left out on purpose to avoid overwhelming beginners.

Im VERY NEW to the whole rc world, and I got a hang of the game and its planes very fast. I bought some planes and they are all great. I REALLY want a first person camera/option in the game. I did read the 'commonly asked questions' page and you already addressed the fpv question, but I think putting it in the game, but warning the player before using it would be a nice mediation to the problem. And I personally dont care about the textures/quality of the ground. But anyways great game, keep up the awesome work. ❤️

​This is one of the apps that actually made me want to buy the Quest 3 in the first place. Flying the RC planes is challenging, rewarding, and highly enjoyable.

​Even when I significantly bump up the resolution using QGO (Quest Games Optimizer), the game smoothly maintains 90 or 120 FPS—at least in single player mode. 

However, there is one minor issue: when a plane flies close by at a slow, mid speed, it occasionally stutters slightly and doesn't feel entirely smooth. Since the FPS counter doesn't show any frame drops, it doesn't seem to be a performance issue.


# ​Suggestions for the developer:

​More scenery: Please add more environments/maps to fly in.

Option to Mute Narration: Please add a toggle/option to turn off the narration voice.

​Remove static models: Please remove the giant RC helicopters and planes parked around the airfield map; they really break the immersion.

This is absolutely amazing blows my mind anyone who loves  planes is going to love this the detail is incredible
  Thomas low who designed this is one incredible clever man thank you from my heart i brought 7 planes witch unlocked the rest the p51 mustang is incredible I can't wait to buy more classic planes when available amazing the details blows my mind thank you

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind words and support!
If you already bought 7 planes, all future ones are free 😉
I don't know who Thomas Low is though?

Davy

reviews.review_description: When I first saw this I thought it would be a scam but I loaded it up I played for a bit an the game was good you can make your own plane if you buy one first

Ok so first off. You have to buy every single plane With money. And that makes me feel like the owner  of the game just wants money. And it is a good game it's just i do not want to have to spent a lot of money on a single game. So I'm sorry.
Crazy fun game, loads of customization, and the way the dev set up the purchasing is great. I'd give it 10 stars if I could.

My wildest dream have come true with this game. I used to build balsa wood planes that flew on strings when I was much younger. Since the 'Build Your Own' module was added, I have built many different flying machines. I love how real the physics are and spend hours fine tuning my creations so the fly perfectly. Thank you for a truely awesome game!
You should get on it right now it's so good
I love this game so much fun

This game is absolutely amazing. I got it thinking it was just gonna be like any other RC playing game but the physics are so fun in the building mode is amazing. I’ve been able to build so many of my favorite planes like fighter jets and World War II planes

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review!
It's great to hear you already managed to build your own favorite planes!
Davy

reviews.review_description: Everything about it is spot on

I was skeptical of all the 5 star reviews. Seemed to good to get true, but what the heck it was free. Boy, what a blast. It comes with one free trainer tail dragger, and three game modes. You can buy more planes, and they are relatively cheap. The game modes are extremely fun. Now, it is definetly not a one for one on reality. The throttle takes some getting used to, and the ability to connect an actual remote control would really take this to the next level. The physics are pretty solid, for the most part. However, that being said, it is a great deal of fun, and I look forward to losing many hours to this game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review!
For most transmitters, there is a way to directly connect it to the Quest. It does add greatly to the immersion and realism, so if you have a transmitter I would invite you to try it. There's lots of experience with different types of transmitters on our Discord.

reviews.review_description: A more recent update with a smaller 3d heli and an indoor venue would be brilliant

Amazing flight sim. The passthrough is great and it's working wonderful with my FrSky Twin Lite transmitter.

Please please please bundle all the airplanes together. A little too pricey for me to buy more than one or two, but if you bundle with a nice discount, then I'd buy them all.

developer_response.body: In a sense there is a bundle: if you buy 7, you get them all. It doesn't really matter if you buy them per piece (everything will unlock after the 7th plane), or if you buy the bundle with all at once, the price is the same. I've tried to keep it simple and fair. The bundle is available behind the "info" button in the airplane menu.

reviews.review_title: The Best game for Quest. A must have!
reviews.review_description: This game is fantastic! I'm a senior and this game checks all my marks. It's the main reasons for me to use my headset. In game I'm known as DelYunquePR, I've made so many connections there with incredible talented people.  MyGuyler, Greg D, Daz, Mr. RC Pilot, Geaby and so many others. They are so generous to share their builds, so much hard work and time they have invested creating stuff. They have built a reputation and are well known. I'm glad I am a part of the community. Proud of every single one of the talented people there and also socializing with everyone there. I want to thank the Dev for this masterpiece and wishing you a successful future.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for the review DelYunquePR. 
Glad to have you in the community, and you're right: I'm a very lucky dev for having such generous, talented and generally nice people playing the sim. Davy

reviews.review_description:
I downloaded it thinking it would just be some horizon junk and was truly blown away at how good this game is. I've played it enough to slowly start buying new aircraft. The other scenery options go harder than I expected. THE COWS RUN FROM YOU! It's visually stunning and runs so smoothly. I also love the Cessna that takes off on the runway map. My only suggestions, more challenges, more to do in multiplayer like a dog fight! Maybe this is a technical stretch and goes against the RC ethos but I would love to try and not vomit with a first person camera mode 😂 

Thank you for a great game!

Oh I wanted to come back and say I had hours of fun just playing with the free content!
Whenever I go to open the game, it immediately quits. I don’t know how to fix this, but other than that, this is a great game. I would recommend this to everybody.

developer_response.body: Hi SouthW3stVR. I'm sorry you experienced this. We have recently introduced a team of moderators and an easier way to report people with inappropriate behavior. We are actively banning users that do not follow the Code of Conduct. Unfortunately we cannot yet prevent all cases from happening, but please keep using the "report" function in the multiplayer user list window. Our moderators try to follow up immediately. Feel free to reach out to davy@quaternionsoftware.com at any time.

reviews.review_title: Good game but also kind of pay to win
reviews.review_description: Like the game but the reason I only gave the game three stars is because you have to buy too much stuff. If the creator of the game, can you please make some of the planes free? Not all of them

developer_response.body:
Everything you need to learn to fly airplanes or helicopters is included for free. You can even build the airplane of your choice for free without limitations. When new features are added, they are usually also added to the free base game. 
The large majority of users never buy an add-on plane, and that is completely fine. But the small percentage that do, make it possible for me to keep developing and improving this sim, and those improvements also improve the free part.
I'm also not trying to take as much money as possible from you, which is why there is a cap of what you can spend: after buying 7 planes, you get all the rest for free.

reviews.review_description:
I’d give it more than 5 stars if I could! Amazing UI, amazing gameplay, and amazing physics! I love the new “build your own” aircraft feature, I have spent hours designing real aircraft. I would like to see more editable/customizable features in the future (i.e. throttle limiters, adjusting curves a little more precisely, nose cones, cockpit canopies/windows, etc.) but even where it is as now is completely fine and just takes a bit of creativity now and then. 

The price tag on unlocking all the aircraft may seem steep at first, but it is totally worth it! 

Go ahead and download this game, you won’t regret it!!

- A very happy customer
You don’t believe how funny and realistic it is. Perfect if you love flying

reviews.review_description: Phenomenal game, especially for free. My RM Boxer Crush works out of the box, like. It was already good with my Quest controller but I was really mindblown when I tried my Radiomaster via USB-C. Awesome!

reviews.review_title: Great sim.  Good models good physics
reviews.review_description: Really enjoying this game, been waiting for a good vr rc game for long time.  All models are good and physics seems good.   Been practicing my heli 3d,  challenging with the hand controllers, but possible if you tune the heli, reducing thrust helps,    connected tx with USB gamepad arduino interface and it brings full 3d flying to life.  Connection is via USB c on left side.  Building new models is fun also and online sharing is fun to see what others are doing.

We need fpv, more planes, and more building freedom. As an O.G player and a supporter (ive bought all the planes) please add more planes, such as the Junkers Ju-87 (working siren of Jericho if possible)

This game is unreal. My only request unless it's already possible? I would like to stand in different areas of the scenery. Is it possible to move around?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
With the way the photorealistic sceneries are rendered, it's technically not possible to move over larger distances without distortion. Maybe in a future update a different type of scenery will be added...
Davy

reviews.review_description: I have casually flown rc planes for many years. I came across this app thinking it was probably going to be pretty weak being a free to download app. Boy was I surprised! This is very realistic and the physics are quite good. I've toyed around with some computer simulators trying to learn helicopters but the VR brings it to the next level. I feel the in app purchases are fairly priced and the variety of planes and backgrounds is good. There are many settings to tweek if you want to customize the experience,  and some mini-games as well. Since it's winter where I am this really scratches my itch to fly! Thanks for creating this great app!
When ever i join a lobby it keeps on kicking me out please fix this

developer_response.body: Hi! We did indeed notice something strange happening when you join a session. It seems to crash the session for everyone. This hasn't happened before. Can you restart the app and maybe try creating your own session? Feel free to reach out to davy@quaternionsoftware.com or join the discord to figure this out together.

developer_response.body: Hi CoolerWilliam88. Only the Cub Trainer, Heli 500 and the build-your-own aircraft are available for free. The jet will become active after you buy it. There should be a buy button available in the menu. If you have any other remarks or questions, feel free to reach out to davy@quaternionsoftware.com.

reviews.review_title: A lot of fun! Just 2 things to tweak...
reviews.review_description:
It´s a very fun game to play. I´ve used the meta controllers and a real RC Controller which both worked fine. I had so much fun, that I bought all the planes within days. There are two tweaks that I wish they would implemented in future updates.
1. The sound for the wind has to turn off individually because it is very annoying hearing the constant noise on the headphones. 
Particularly if I switch the wind direction to come from one side only. 
2. I find it realy hard to impossible to use the thermals if flying a glider. Even if I turn the indicators (bubbles/birds) on, I struggle to find the exact possition of the thermals. Maybe the implementation of a Vertical Velocity Indicator could help. Perhaps there is a way to include more visual help....

Just 2 small suggestions to make this game even better.
 
That´s it. Try it, have fun. Buy all the additional stuff, have more fun!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review and the suggestions!
In the upcoming release the volume of the wind will be controlled by the "environmental effects volume" slider.
The variometer for the glider is also on the wish list (but to be honest, it's a very long list).
Feel free to follow along on the development on our Discord at https://dsc.gg/rcpt

reviews.review_title: Best purchase I've made on my VR headset
reviews.review_description:
I fly rc helicopters. (3d / sport) When I first got this game, it had no helicopters in the fleet. The developer has consistently added new scenes, an AR scene, several aircraft, boats, even a blimp.  When the first helicopter was added, it wasn't perfect. But it wasn't long before the 700 series helicopter was added and wow! It's fantastic! Not only does it feel like a real 700 series, he added two idle up modes and a throttle cut. The physics are spot-on accurate and I'm even able to practice auto-rotations.   This is all with the occulus/meta controllers too. I'm afraid that if I use my radio transmitter, I wont have a reason to go to flying field anymore.  :) 

I'm a software engineer by day and I worked for Unity for 2+ years . This is a solid, very well made simulator and this developer has put a lot of time and effort into making it.  I am happy to support him.  Hats off to you on the quality and frequency of updates. The IAP model is great.  Whether you buy all the models upfront like I did,  or pay as you go, it will be $20 well spent.  Easily the best purchase I've made on the meta platform.  Looking forward to future updates!

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much! Quite a compliment from both an RC pilot and a SW engineer. I was hesitant to add helicopters because I don't fly them in real life, but I'm very glad that with the feedback from 3D pilots I managed to make something decent.
Still working hard on making this an even better sim!
Davy

reviews.review_description:
It’s a very good game, but I got banned because I’ve explaining to a gentleman about how this kid was yelling a bunch of swear words
 in the other lobby and I got banned for saying swear words but that overall with a very good game it’s just you only get one plane and one helicopter and you have to pay money for the rest but I would recommend
￼ This one only too sad because there’s mostly zero nonpaid planes and to get more build that you need to buy planes which is pretty ridiculous￼

developer_response.body:
I'm sorry you feel this way. You get a trainer airplane and a helicopter for free, plus the possibility to build your own. Also virtually all functionality is available in the free version allowing you to learn to fly an actual RC airplane or helicopter completely for free. Unfortunately I also have to make a living and without the paid content, I would not be able to keep developing this app, which is my full time job. I also don't want to take advantage of the addictive nature of RC building and flying, which is why I won't let you spend more than the price of 7 airplanes before you get all the content.
Nevertheless I hope you're having a great time with the included content and hope to convince you one day that the add-ons are worth the $3.

Davy

reviews.review_description: Awesome!  I use with my real flight controller and cable adapter from usb to usb-c. Acro model with my custom setting. Just like my plane at my real life RC field.  I used the pass thru cameras actually at our RC field and flew there. Everyone was amazed!!

I can only agree with the reviews below, having recently bought the Quest 3S mainly to play Thief VR,
having played all the previous Thief games. I was searching for some free games to explore the capabilities of the headset and I was very pleasantly surprised to come across this game, as I am also an experienced RC pilot IRL, flying mainly fixed wing aircraft,
but recently also experimenting with helicopters.
I regularly practice with Realflight, using my Radiomaster TX16S transmitter with a WiFi dongle.
My preferred setup is to use my home cinema system - this gives me a massive screen - albeit 2D of course.
I have to say that I am very impressed with the whole experience, and the ready availability of the developer for discussion and comment is fantastic.
For me, the one area of difficulty is visibility when you fly into the distance - I have now installed the Quest Games Optimizer (QGO),
which definitely helps. 
In addition you can look at the transmitter to see the aircraft orientation when at a distance,
but this means looking away from the 'actual' aircraft ( a definite no-no IRL! )
Can you add better crash physics and like stall and like add trigger emergency stuff like stall or fire or lights and first person
